cases.doc: Investor already settled (in this or a previous batch).
cases.name: AlreadySettled

cases.doc: Duplicate investor address within the same batch.
cases.name: DuplicateInvestor

cases.doc: Payout to address holding zero tokens.
cases.name: PhantomInvestor

cases.doc: Fee exceeds the max_fee_bps cap declared at initialization.
cases.name: FeeTooHigh

cases.doc: accept_admin() called but no propose_admin() is pending.
cases.name: NoPendingAdmin

cases.doc: v3 (F-006): supplied usdc_sac is not the canonical USDC SAC for this network.
cases.name: UnauthorizedToken

udt_union_v0.doc: Per-offer contract state keys.\nEach deployed contract instance = one offer.\nNo offer_id needed \xe2\x80\x94 the contract address IS the offer scope.
udt_union_v0.name: DataKey

tuple_v0.doc: Tracks USDC deposited by a specific address (typically the company).
tuple_v0.name: Deposit

tuple_v0.doc: Per-investor settlement flag. Set after an investor is settled.\nStored in persistent storage. Prevents double-payout across batches.
tuple_v0.name: InvestorSettled

void_v0.doc: Counter of total investors settled. Used as guard for refund().\nStored in instance storage (fast access).
void_v0.name: SettledCount

void_v0.doc: Active admin override. Set after a successful accept_admin().\nIf absent (fresh-init contract), Config.admin is the active admin.\nAdded in v2.
void_v0.name: Admin

void_v0.doc: Admin proposed by current admin via propose_admin(), awaiting\nnew admin's accept_admin() call. Cleared on acceptance.\nAdded in v2.
void_v0.name: PendingAdmin

void_v0.doc:
Pause flag \xe2\x80\x94 when true, deposit/settle_batch/withdraw/refund return
ContractPaused. Upgrade and admin-rotation are intentionally
NOT gated (the recovery path must remain accessible).
Added in v2.
void_v0.name: Paused

udt_struct_v0.doc:
Immutable configuration set once during initialize().

`admin`: issuer public key \xe2\x80\x94 must be SAC admin for both USDC (transfer) and
security token (clawback). Signs settle_batch() and withdraw().
`usdc_sac`: USDC SAC contract address (for payouts + fee routing).
`token_sac`: security token SAC contract address (for clawback/burn).
`treasury`: platform treasury address (receives aggregated fees).
`max_fee_bps`: maximum fee in basis points (e.g. 200 = 2%). Immutable after init.
Enforced on-chain: total_fee \xe2\x89\xa4 sum(payouts) \xc3\x97 max_fee_bps / 10_000.
CVM transparency: auditors can verify fee cap on-chain.
udt_struct_v0.name: Config

udt_struct_v0.doc:
One item in a settlement batch \xe2\x80\x94 represents a single investor's payout.

Clawback is AUTOMATIC: the contract reads the investor's on-chain token
balance and burns ALL of it. No clawback_amount needed \xe2\x80\x94 the chain is
the source of truth.

```text
investor \xe2\x97\x84\xe2\x94\x80\xe2\x94\x80 payout USDC \xe2\x94\x80\xe2\x94\x80 contract
investor \xe2\x94\x80\xe2\x94\x80\xe2\x96\xba ALL tokens clawbacked (read from chain)
```
udt_struct_v0.name: SettleItem

function_v0.doc:
Initialize the per-offer settlement contract. Called once after deployment.

`admin`: issuer public key (SAC admin for clawback authority).
`usdc_sac`: USDC SAC contract address.
`token_sac`: security token SAC contract address.
`treasury`: platform treasury for fee routing.
`max_fee_bps`: maximum platform fee in basis points (200 = 2%).
Immutable after init. Enforced in settle_batch().
function_v0.name: initialize

function_v0.doc: Company deposits USDC into this settlement contract.\nDepositor signs via passkey (C... smart wallet).\nMultiple deposits from the same depositor accumulate (checked_add).
function_v0.name: deposit

function_v0.doc:
Atomically settle a batch of investors:
1. Validate: no duplicates, no phantom investors
2. USDC \xe2\x86\x92 each investor (payout)
3. Read on-chain token balance \xe2\x86\x92 clawback ALL (burn)
4. USDC \xe2\x86\x92 treasury (aggregated fee)

TRUSTLESS: Clawback is automatic. The contract reads each investor's
token balance from the chain and burns ALL of it. No backend input
needed for burns \xe2\x80\x94 the public ledger is the source of truth.

MULTI-BATCH: Can be called multiple times with different investor sets.
Per-investor idempotency prevents double-payouts across batches.
function_v0.name: settle_batch

function_v0.doc: Admin withdraws any token from the contract (emergency recovery).
function_v0.name: withdraw

function_v0.doc: Admin refunds a depositor's USDC. Blocked after settlement (V-1).\nOnly callable by admin (not depositor) to prevent company self-refund attack.
function_v0.name: refund

function_v0.doc: Upgrade contract WASM. Admin only (high-privilege).\nIntentionally NOT pause-gated \xe2\x80\x94 upgrade is the recovery path when a\npause has been triggered to contain a bug.
function_v0.name: upgrade

function_v0.doc: Pause the contract. Admin-only. Blocks deposit/settle/withdraw/refund.\nUpgrade and accept_admin remain accessible (recovery paths).
function_v0.name: pause

function_v0.doc: Step 1 of admin rotation: current admin proposes a new admin.\nThe new admin must then call accept_admin() to take ownership.\nOverwrites any prior pending proposal.
function_v0.name: propose_admin

function_v0.doc: Step 2 of admin rotation: pending admin accepts ownership.\nThe pending admin must sign \xe2\x80\x94 proves they hold the keypair (prevents\ntransfer-to-typo'd-address footgun).
function_v0.name: accept_admin

function_v0.doc: Returns whether the contract is paused.
function_v0.name: get_paused

function_v0.doc: Returns the pending admin if one has been proposed.
function_v0.name: get_pending_admin

function_v0.doc: Extend contract instance TTL. Anyone can call (allows cron jobs).
function_v0.name: extend_ttl

function_v0.doc: Read: deposit amount for a specific depositor.
function_v0.name: get_deposit
